productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Brown Sandals
description: The perfect way to complement your ethno-western wear is to slip into these classy sandals from carlton london. The leather straps in a criss-cross style makes this a fab addition to your party wardrobe. Heel: 3" Upper Leather straps in a criss-cross style Buckle closure on the ankle strap Ergonomically curved leather footbed Outsole TPU outsole with textured circles for grip Wedge heel for style Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
